basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Occupational Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has published the Occupational Therapist, Class-3 Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Occupational Therapist, Class-3 position. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding a Bachelor’s Degree in Occupational Therapy are eligible to apply online through the official GSSSB website. The application process will be active from the notification release date to 27-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: General Category Physically Handicapped Male Candidates: 10 years (Max 45 years) General Category Physically Handicapped Female Candidates: 15 years (Max 45 years) Reserved Category Physically Handicapped Male Candidates: 15 years (Max 45 years) Reserved Category Physically Handicapped Female Candidates: 20 years (Max 45 years)

qualification.details: Bachelor degree in Occupational Therapy obtained from any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India; or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared to be deemed as a University under section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act 1956 Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat civil services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

salary_details.details: Fixed pay of Rs. 49,600/- per month for the first five years. After completion of five years, if the service is satisfactory, the candidate will be eligible for regular appointment in the pay scale of Rs. 39,900/- to Rs. 1,26,600/- (Level-7) of the Seventh Pay Commission.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Fixed pay of Rs. 49,600/- per month for the first five years. After completion of five years, if the service is satisfactory, the candidate will be eligible for regular appointment in the pay scale of Rs. 39,900/- to Rs. 1,26,600/- (Level-7) of the Seventh Pay Commission.

GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 recruitment is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Occupational Therapist, Class-3 post is 18 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 post is 35 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Occupational Therapy to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Occupational Therapist, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Occupational Therapist, Class-3 post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Unreserved category?
faq.answer: The application fee for the Unreserved category is Rs. 350/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the starting salary for the Occupational Therapist, Class-3?
faq.answer: The starting salary is a fixed pay of Rs. 49,600/- per month for the first five years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (MCQ) followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I apply for the GSSSB Occupational Therapist, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of GSSSB, ojas.gujarat.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for GSSSB recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for GSSSB recruitment is ojas.gujarat.gov.in.
